Explored full pi primitives: pi-agent-core Agent API, pi-tui TUI components, pi-coding-agent extension/skill/prompt-template docs, questionnaire.ts example, plan-mode example, fleet extension, qna.ts example, existing PLAN.md format

FINDINGS SUMMARY — Skills: static SKILL.md doc injected into LLM context on demand via /skill:name or auto-read tool; best for reusable planning doctrine (how to plan, what to challenge, domain-specific checklists). No code, no UI, just instructions the model follows. Prompt Templates: .md files expanded at /template; purely static prompt shorthand with positional args; useful as a quick-launch alias for the planner but secondary to the real entrypoint. Extension Commands: TypeScript, registered via pi.registerCommand(); own the interactive flow, state persistence, file writes, and orchestration; the right home for /planner entrypoint. Extension Tools (LLM-callable): registered via pi.registerTool(); reusable questionnaire tool already exists; a plan_write tool could be added so the LLM can emit a structured plan that the extension then writes to PLAN.md. Key APIs: ctx.ui.custom() for full TUI component replacing editor (like questionnaire.ts multi-tab wizard); ctx.ui.select()/input()/editor() for simpler dialogs; pi.appendEntry() for durable per-session state; session_start event to restore state on resume; pi.sendUserMessage() / pi.sendMessage() to inject turns; before_agent_start to inject planner context into every LLM turn without duplicating it in UI messages

ARCHITECTURE RECOMMENDATION — /planner extension command (NOT a modal toggle) owns the workflow: (1) Kickoff: ctx.ui.select() to choose planning depth (spike/MVP/internal-tool/production/compliance-hardened); (2) Load planner skill via before_agent_start message injection so LLM has planning doctrine in context; (3) Run interactive questionnaire using ctx.ui.custom() (reuse questionnaire.ts pattern) for structured multi-question interview; (4) Agentic refinement loop: pi.sendUserMessage() drives LLM turns, agent_end handler detects draft plan in assistant output and offers refine/challenge/finalize options via ctx.ui.select(); (5) On finalize: write PLAN.md via fs.writeFile(path.join(ctx.cwd, 'PLAN.md'), content). State: pi.appendEntry('planner-state', {phase, depth, answers, draftPlan}) + session_start restoration so /resume works across turns. Extension is independent of fleet (fleet only reads PLAN.md) and independent of questionnaire extension (can coexist). Skill provides reusable planning doctrine and planning-depth taxonomy. Optional prompt template /plan as a quick alias. Custom TUI component for the interactive interview step follows questionnaire.ts tab-navigation pattern. Plan persistence across multiple refinement turns uses appendEntry + session branch scan on session_start. Final PLAN.md write uses fleet task format: Overview + numbered ### Task NNN sections with engine/profile/depends/description frontmatter.
